_comment: Glen's manual catalog corrections, applied over the LLM-cleaned enrichment by scripts/apply_enrichment.py. Each entry overrides ingredients (and clears gk_stale if the formula is now authoritative here). Slugs here override the HOLD list. ingredients_source 'manual' = Glen-verified.

tmg-syntropy-powder-trimethylglycine.note: TMG Syntropy Powder includes Vitamin B15 & B16 (Glen 2026-06-05)

humic-acid.note: Single-ingredient Pure Powder (Glen). FMP 'Fulvic Acid Complex' match was wrong.

magnesium-taurate.note: Single-ingredient Pure Powder (Glen). FMP 'Magnesium Glycinate' match was wrong.
